heading: Reinstatement
label: 1978 Reinstatement
text: Reinstatement of insurance coverage granted under this subchapter but lapsed for nonpayment of premiums shall be under terms and conditions prescribed by the Secretary.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section and substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 102–83section 778 of this title

Effective DateSection effective first day of third calendar month following May 1974, see , set out as an Effective Date of 1974 Amendment note under .section 12(4) of Pub. L. 93–289section 1968 of this title
